headline: Michael Svoboda
body: Michael Svoboda is in advanced talks over a move to Brighton.
text:
🚨💥 EXCL | Michael Svoboda to Brighton - DONE DEAL ✔️
Brighton have activated the €5m release clause for the 27 y/o centre-back from Venezia FC.
An agreement between Svoboda and Brighton had already been reached. Medical likely next week during the World Cup.   🇦🇹
draft_caption:
🔵 REPORTED: Michael Svoboda → Brighton
Michael Svoboda is in advanced talks over a move to Brighton.
